## Review checklist

- [ ] The issue acceptance criteria are satisfied.
- [ ] The diff contains one primary concern and no unrelated user changes.
- [ ] New behavior has positive and negative-path coverage.
- [ ] Documentation matches the implementation.
- [ ] No credentials, tokens, customer data, workspaces, or machine-local state are included.
- [ ] I reviewed the complete diff and understand any AI-generated changes.
